positioningNote: Like radar: fence-line × satellite × NOAA magnetic layers × HIFLD transmission corridors for placement fidelity. No GPS collars.

dataSources.name: Fence-line radar transmit · 1420 MHz Goubau grid
feeds: OpenWebRX hydrogen line · PLL microsecond returns per gate
dataSources.role: Primary radar transmit/receive along high-tensile perimeter

dataSources.name: Open-Meteo · ECMWF assimilated soil moisture
feeds: soil_moisture_0_to_1cm · satellite + station assimilation per pasture centroid
dataSources.role: Satellite-class reflectivity pass cross-referenced with fence-line radar returns

dataSources.name: HIFLD · US Electric Power Transmission Lines
feeds: ArcGIS FeatureServer · ≥69 kV lines in Turner network bbox
dataSources.role: Transmission corridor geometry · magnetic leverage for radar grid boost

dataSources.name: NOAA SWPC · geomagnetic stack
dataSources.role: Higher magnetic layers · resolution boost + GIC-style coupling with grid

dataSources.name: NOAA Space Weather Prediction Center
dataSources.role: Solar flux · planetary Kp · ionospheric correction before radar fuse

dataSources.name: Turner Institute of Ecoagriculture
feeds: Public spring pasture rotation · Flying D river-basin gates

dataSources.name: Turner Endangered Species Fund
feeds: Winter-exit mean mass profile · conservation registries

dataSources.name: NSPFRNP passive radar pipeline
feeds: INGEST → SCALE (EGS φ) → RADAR fuse → SYNTHESIS
dataSources.role: Cross-reference fence-line with satellite for herd map
